objective: Generate one tiny Nano Banana Pro validation image so Flow Arm can prove the Track 4.B claim and result-manifest path.
preflight_notes: Aaron explicitly approved this validation packet for dispatch; moved from draft to outgoing handoff queue.

prompts.base_concept: A quiet Series-world threshold at the edge of an old stone interior, with soft living overgrowth and late light crossing the floor.

targets.rendered_prompt: A sacred still Series-world stone threshold, quiet interior edge, soft living overgrowth, late warm light crossing the floor, grounded cinematic composition, no text, no signage, no modern objects, 2k.
